form.feelingPlaceholder: what are you feeling? tell a little more if you can.
form.copedPlaceholder: if something started to help — come back and write what. even a tiny thing.
form.success: ✦ your spark is on the map now.
form.rejected: we can't publish this exact wording. try rephrasing.
form.rateLimited: you've shared recently. please wait a bit before sharing again.
form.forbidden: this spark belongs to a different session. you can't edit it from here.
form.error: something went wrong. please try again.

body: this is a map of everyone still holding on.
maybe you can't leave your room tonight. maybe you haven't spoken out loud in weeks. maybe you look fine and you're not.
you don't have to fix it tonight. you don't have to hold any shape. you just have to stay.
every spark here is someone else who stayed.
manifesto.quote: the cold never lasts, my darling. it just teaches the heart how to burn.
